titles.title: You Are My Love and my Light

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: You are my love and my light You are my purpose for living You are my hope in the night My reason for singing You bring the joy to my life (And You're) Making it better and better And I will give thanks forever and ever :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Will we ever know What we have been given He has chosen us and called us His own Flowing from His throne There is a river Bringing life and health wherever it goes

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are my love and my light You are my purpose for living You are my hope in the night My reason for singing You bring the joy to my life (And You're) Making it better and better And I will give thanks forever and ever

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We will bless You name Always and ever And offer up the sacrifices of praise Teach us Lord we pray To live in Your presence Make us more and more Like You everyday

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Ooh. . What a joy to know Ooh. . The Father loves us all
